title: Massive Wildfire Season
description: Record-breaking wildfires threaten towns and critical infrastructure.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Mandatory evacuations save lives. Wildfires move faster than people expect.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Forced evacuations violate autonomy. People should choose whether to stay.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: This isn’t about choice — it’s about cost. Rebuilding burned towns drains national resources.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Exactly. Prevention is cheaper than rescue.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Blanket mandates breed resentment. Local control respects community judgment.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Local control is fine until it fails. Then the bill lands on us.
